rules.name: API Token Used from Multiple IPs
rules.description: Detects a single API token being used from more than 3 distinct IPs in an hour.
rules.author: Wardex Contributors

rules.name: Brute Force Login Attempts
rules.description: Detects multiple failed login attempts from a single source within a short time window indicating a brute-force attack.
rules.author: Wardex Contributors

rules.name: Credential Stuffing via Known Breach List
rules.description: Detects login attempts using credentials from known breach databases.
rules.author: Wardex Contributors

rules.name: Login from Unusual Geolocation
rules.description: Detects authentication from a geolocation not previously seen for the user.
rules.author: Wardex Contributors

rules.name: Successful Login After Multiple Failures
rules.description: Detects a successful authentication following several failed attempts — potential successful brute force.
rules.author: Wardex Contributors

rules.name: Cloud Database Snapshot Shared Externally
rules.description: Detects RDS/Cloud SQL snapshot being shared with external accounts, enabling data exfiltration.
rules.author: Wardex Contributors

rules.name: Cloud Function or Lambda Deployed with Admin Privileges
rules.description: Detects serverless function deployment with overly permissive IAM role (admin or wildcard).
rules.author: Wardex Contributors

rules.name: Cloud Logging Disabled
rules.description: Detects disabling of cloud audit logging (CloudTrail, GCP Audit, Azure Activity) which is a common defense evasion technique.
rules.author: Wardex Contributors

rules.name: Cloud Resource Created in Unusual Region
rules.description: Detects cloud resources provisioned in regions not previously used by the organization.
rules.author: Wardex Contributors

rules.name: Cloud Storage Public Access Enabled
rules.description: Detects a storage bucket or blob container being made publicly accessible.
rules.author: Wardex Contributors

rules.name: GCP Service Account Key Created
rules.description: Detects creation of service account keys which can be used for persistent unauthorized access.
rules.author: Wardex Contributors

rules.name: IAM Policy Weakened
rules.description: Detects IAM policy changes that broaden permissions or add wildcard access.
rules.author: Wardex Contributors

rules.name: IAM Role Assumed by Unusual Principal
rules.description: Detects sts:AssumeRole calls from principals not previously seen assuming this role, indicating potential privilege escalation.
rules.author: Wardex Contributors

rules.name: Impossible Travel for Cloud Admin
rules.description: Detects cloud console logins from geographically impossible locations within a short time window.
rules.author: Wardex Contributors

rules.name: MFA Disabled for User
rules.description: Detects MFA being disabled for a user account.
rules.author: Wardex Contributors

rules.name: OAuth Application Granted High Privileges
rules.description: Detects OAuth consent grants with high-privilege scopes (e.g. Directory.ReadWrite.All, Mail.ReadWrite) that could enable account takeover.
rules.author: Wardex Contributors

rules.name: S3 Bucket Policy Changed to Allow Cross-Account Access
rules.description: Detects S3 bucket policy modifications that grant access to external AWS accounts.
rules.author: Wardex Contributors

rules.name: Unauthorized Cloud API Call
rules.description: Detects API calls to cloud management planes that are not in the approved action list.
rules.author: Wardex Contributors

rules.name: Unusual Data Download Volume from Cloud
rules.description: Detects download of large data volumes from cloud storage or databases.
rules.author: Wardex Contributors

rules.name: C2 Communication via DNS Tunneling
rules.description: Detects DNS tunneling used for command and control
rules.author: Wardex Team

rules.name: C2 via Cloud Storage Services
rules.description: Detects C2 communication via cloud storage (Dropbox, Google Drive, OneDrive)
rules.author: Wardex Team

rules.name: C2 via HTTPS Beaconing
rules.description: Detects periodic HTTPS beaconing indicative of C2 communication

rules.name: Cobalt Strike Default Profile

rules.author: Wardex Team

rules.name: Domain Fronting Detection
rules.description: Detects domain fronting used to hide C2 traffic

rules.name: Encrypted Channel via Non-Standard Port
rules.description: Detects TLS/SSL traffic on non-standard ports indicating C2

rules.name: Fast Flux DNS Detection

rules.name: IRC-Based C2 Communication
rules.description: Detects IRC protocol usage indicating botnet C2

rules.description: Detects Sliver C2 framework communication indicators

rules.name: Tor Exit Node Communication
